summary: RE-TEST #2: Special Price Request Feature - Backend APIs verified working, frontend E2E testing blocked by Playwright automation issues. Code review confirms notice bug fix and CheckoutItemCard refactor are correctly implemented.

backend_issues.notes: All backend APIs tested and working correctly via curl

integration_issues.issue: Unable to complete E2E UI testing due to persistent Playwright session/navigation issues. Login page loads but automation cannot reliably navigate past login to POS page.
integration_issues.impact: Cannot verify PRIMARY TEST (notice + badge appearing simultaneously after approval) via automated UI testing
integration_issues.workaround: Backend APIs verified working. Manual testing recommended to confirm UI integration.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/price-approvals - Creates price approval with status 'pending' ✅
Backend: POST /api/price-approvals/{id}/approve - Approves price approval, status changes to 'approved' ✅
Backend: GET /api/price-approvals/effective - Returns approved special price with has_special=true ✅
Backend: Full create->approve->effective chain works correctly ✅
Code Review: CheckoutItemCard.jsx - Notice rendering logic fixed (lines 43-59), notice appears even when isSpecial=true ✅
Code Review: CheckoutDrawer.jsx - Refactored to use CheckoutItemCard component, all data-testids preserved ✅
Code Review: RequestSpecialPriceModal.jsx - onSubmitted callback correctly sets notice state and triggers spRefresh ✅
Code Review: Backend price_approvals.py - /effective endpoint returns correct data structure ✅

items.description: Automated E2E testing blocked by Playwright session issues. Please perform manual testing to verify: (1) After admin clicks 'Setujui & Terapkan', BOTH cart-item-sp-notice-<pid> (green) AND cart-item-special-<pid> (badge) appear simultaneously. (2) After clicking 'Ajukan untuk Approval', amber notice appears. (3) Checkout flow still works after CheckoutItemCard refactor.
items.reason: Backend APIs verified working via curl, but UI integration needs manual verification

items.description: Playwright automation unable to reliably navigate past login page. Session may not be persisting correctly, or there may be timing issues with page loads. Consider adding explicit wait conditions or investigating if there's a test mode/bypass for automation.
items.reason: Blocking automated E2E testing for future features

results.approve: ✅ Approved successfully, status changed to 'approved', approved_by: 'Budi Santoso'

CheckoutItemCard.jsx.lines_43_59: ✅ FIXED: Notice rendering condition changed from `!isSpecial` to `notice || !isSpecial`. This ensures notice appears even when badge (isSpecial) is present, fixing the original bug where notice disappeared after approval.
CheckoutItemCard.jsx.line_31: ✅ Badge renders when isSpecial=true with data-testid='cart-item-special-{pid}'
CheckoutItemCard.jsx.line_46: ✅ Notice renders with data-testid='cart-item-sp-notice-{pid}' and correct styling (green for applied, amber for pending)

CheckoutDrawer.jsx.lines_285_300: ✅ REFACTORED: Cart items now use CheckoutItemCard component. All props passed correctly including sp, notice, callbacks.
CheckoutDrawer.jsx.lines_480_492: ✅ RequestSpecialPriceModal onSubmitted callback sets notice state and triggers spRefresh when applied=true
CheckoutDrawer.jsx.lines_59_76: ✅ spRefresh trigger causes debounced re-fetch of /price-approvals/effective endpoint

RequestSpecialPriceModal.jsx.lines_63_74: ✅ handleApprove creates approval, approves it, then calls onSubmitted with applied=true and success message
RequestSpecialPriceModal.jsx.lines_51_61: ✅ handleRequest creates approval, calls onSubmitted with applied=false and pending message

playwright_issues_encountered: Login page loads but 'Masuk' button selector times out after clicking Admin role
Session does not persist between page navigations
Direct URL navigation to /pos redirects back to login
Multiple retry attempts with different selectors and wait times all failed
Screenshots show login page repeatedly despite successful API login via curl

immediate: Perform manual testing of the PRIMARY TEST: verify notice + badge appear together after approval
Test the request flow (amber notice for pending approvals)
Verify checkout regression testing (qty edit, remove, order creation still work)
future: Add Playwright-friendly test mode or authentication bypass for E2E testing
Consider adding explicit data-testid to login form elements
Investigate session persistence issues in preview environment
